description: FIFO mail injection JSON encoding fails fatally on dispatch bodies containing code blocks, heredocs with backslashes, or embedded JSON snippets. Headless claude's stream-json parser exits on Invalid escape character. Reproduced overstory-7b8c b3-consumers-7b8c death from lead's second dispatch msg-6pxb351butuc; stderr.log showed truncated JSON-escaped body. Symptom: builder commits zero work, sessions.db state goes 'completed' immediately after dispatch, no mail emitted.
resolution: Until Phase 3 (overstory-2cf9) eliminates FIFO for non-builders: coordinator and lead dispatchers must keep mail bodies as plain prose. AVOID code blocks, heredocs, JSON snippets, backslash-heavy patterns. Reference spec files via path instead of inlining. For builders specifically, Phase 2 (overstory-7b8c, merged 59c43b7) eliminates FIFO entirely when runtime.claudeSpawnPerTurn flag is enabled — turn-runner uses pipe stdin not FIFO so JSON encoding lives in Bun.spawn, not the FIFO writer. Tracking issue: overstory-d3b2.
